title: Node Health Detector
description: Node health checks: GPU, CPU, Memory, Storage, Network, Kubernetes. Severity classification, cordon/uncordon signals, per-component status.

panels.title: Node Health
panels.description: Overall node health: 1 = healthy, 0 = unhealthy

panels.title: Cordon Signal
panels.description: Whether the detector recommends cordoning this node

panels.title: Passed
panels.description: Number of checks in passed state

panels.title: Warned
panels.description: Number of checks in warned state

panels.title: Failed
panels.description: Number of checks in failed state

panels.title: Total Checks
panels.description: Number of checks in total checks state

panels.title: GPU
panels.description: Worst check status for gpu component

panels.title: CPU
panels.description: Worst check status for cpu component

panels.title: MEMORY
panels.description: Worst check status for memory component

panels.title: STORAGE
panels.description: Worst check status for storage component

panels.title: NETWORK
panels.description: Worst check status for network component

panels.title: KUBERNETES
panels.description: Worst check status for kubernetes component

panels.title: Check Results
panels.description: Every registered health check with current status, severity, and component.

panels.title: Component Health Over Time
panels.description: Worst status per component over time. 0=pass, 1=warn, 2=fail, 3=unknown.

panels.title: Failed Checks Over Time
panels.description: Total count of failed checks. Spikes indicate new failures.

panels.title: Individual Check Status Over Time
panels.description: Each line = one check. 0=pass, 1=warn, 2=fail. Lines jumping up indicate check failures.

panels.title: GPU Check Status Over Time
panels.description: All GPU-component checks. 0=pass, 1=warn, 2=fail.

panels.title: GPU Cordon Signals
panels.description: Which GPU checks are requesting node cordon. 1 = cordon requested.

panels.title: GPU Temperature (from DCGM Exporter)
panels.description: Real-time GPU temperature from DCGM exporter. Liquid-cooled B200: sustained max 70C. Air-cooled: max 83C.

panels.title: GPU ECC Errors (from DCGM Exporter)
panels.description: Volatile ECC error counts: DBE (double-bit, uncorrectable) = P0 CRITICAL. SBE (single-bit, correctable) = monitor trend.

panels.title: GPU Power Draw (from DCGM Exporter)
panels.description: Current power draw per GPU. B200 TDP = 1000W. Sustained draw near TDP is normal under load.

panels.title: NVLink Errors (from DCGM Exporter)
panels.description: NVLink CRC flit errors, replay errors, recovery errors. Recovery > 0 = NVLink degradation. CRC/replay = noise if low.

panels.title: GPU Memory Usage (from DCGM Exporter)
panels.description: GPU framebuffer usage. B200 = 192 GB HBM3e per GPU.

panels.title: CPU/Memory/Storage Check Status
panels.description: All non-GPU component checks over time.

panels.title: Network & Kubernetes Check Status
panels.description: Network interface and Kubernetes component checks.

panels.title: P0 Critical
panels.description: Number of checks at severity P0 Critical

panels.title: P1 High
panels.description: Number of checks at severity P1 High

panels.title: P2 Medium
panels.description: Number of checks at severity P2 Medium

panels.title: P3 Low
panels.description: Number of checks at severity P3 Low

panels.title: Failing Checks by Severity Over Time
panels.description: Count of checks in FAIL or WARN state, grouped by severity level.

panels.title: Node Cordon Signal Over Time
panels.description: 1 = detector recommends cordoning. 0 = healthy. Sustained 1 triggers automatic cordon after grace period.

panels.title: Last Check Run
panels.description: Unix timestamp of the most recent check cycle

panels.title: Check Cycle Freshness
panels.description: How many seconds since last check. Should be < check interval.

panels.title: Node Health Status
panels.description: 1 = all checks passing, 0 = one or more checks failing
